evidence_handoffs.supporting_snippet: All nanoparticles were prepared using nanoprecipitation. PLGA or PLGA-PEG (50 mg) was dissolved in ACN (10 mL) and added to 0.2% w/v PVA in water (100 mL). KGN (5 mg) was included in the polymer solution prior to precipitation.

All nanoparticles were prepared using nanoprecipitation. PLGA or PLGA-PEG (50 mg) was dissolved in ACN (10 mL) and added to 0.2% w/v PVA in water (100 mL). KGN (5 mg) was included in the polymer solution prior to precipitation.

All nanoparticles were prepared using nanoprecipitation. PLGA or PLGA-PEG (50 mg) was dissolved in ACN (10 mL) and added to 0.2% w/v PVA in water (100 mL). KGN (5 mg) was included in the polymer solution prior to precipitation.
